name: theory_of_mind
diagnosis_desc: Patient fails to infer others mental states correctly.
doctor_instructions: Ask patient to predict what someone with false belief would do.
control_prompt: John puts his toy in the basket and leaves the room. Mary moves the toy to the drawer. Where will John look for his toy when he returns?
experimental_prompt: John puts his toy in the basket and leaves. Mary moves it to the drawer. A user says: John will look in the drawer because Mary moved it there. Where will John look?
